[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001010 2
1 10110011 5
2 10000000 1
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 01110110 5

12 21 10011010 4

34 43 00000010 1

67 76 10000000 1 match 2
70 07 00000000 a match 3 4 5 6

57 75 00000000 a match 3 4 5 6
